skills.name: Shipment Plan
skills.description: Build a period shipment plan with volumes, modes, lanes, owners, constraints, and phased milestones so freight moves on time and on cost.

skills.name: Route Optimization
skills.description: Optimize multi-stop or multi-lane routes for cost, transit time, capacity, and service constraints, with ranked alternatives and trade-offs.

skills.name: Carrier Selection
skills.description: Compare and recommend carriers by lane, mode, service level, cost, capacity, and performance so selection decisions are defensible and repeatable.

skills.name: Logistics SLA Framework
skills.description: Define logistics service-level agreements covering OTIF, transit, claims, response times, remedies, and measurement methods for carriers and 3PLs.

skills.name: ETA Customer Update
skills.description: Draft clear ETA and shipment-status communications for customers or stakeholders with key milestones, tone, and a concrete call to action.

skills.name: Delay Notification
skills.description: Write delay notifications that explain impact, revised ETAs, recovery options, and next steps while protecting trust and service reputation.

skills.name: Damage Claim Package
skills.description: Assemble a freight damage claim package with evidence checklist, liability notes, cost breakdown, carrier contacts, and follow-up timeline.

skills.name: Returns Process Design
skills.description: Design end-to-end product returns flows covering authorization, labels, inspection, disposition, refunds, and warehouse handoffs.

skills.name: Warehouse Slotting Plan
skills.description: Produce a warehouse slotting plan that places SKUs by velocity, cube, affinity, and pick path to cut travel time and raise pick accuracy.

skills.name: Pick-and-Pack Standards
skills.description: Define pick-and-pack methods, batching rules, quality checks, packing standards, and labor guidance for accurate, efficient order fulfillment.

skills.name: Cycle Count Program
skills.description: Design a cycle-count program with ABC frequency, count methods, variance thresholds, root-cause steps, and inventory accuracy targets.

skills.name: Cold Chain Protocol
skills.description: Specify cold-chain handling, packaging, monitoring, handoff rules, and excursion response so temperature-sensitive goods stay in range.

skills.name: Hazmat Handling Note
skills.description: Document hazmat classification, packaging, labeling, segregation, documentation, and carrier requirements for safe, compliant shipments.

skills.name: Last-Mile Delivery Plan
skills.description: Plan last-mile delivery options, density zones, service windows, cost-to-serve, and exception handling for reliable final-mile performance.

skills.name: Cross-Dock Design
skills.description: Design cross-dock flows for inbound-to-outbound transfer with dock scheduling, staging logic, dwell targets, and exception paths.

skills.name: Milk-Run Route Plan
skills.description: Create milk-run pickup and delivery loops with stop sequences, frequencies, windows, and load balances to reduce empty miles and cost.

skills.name: Logistics Network Design
skills.description: Evaluate facility, mode, and flow network options with cost, service, risk, and capacity trade-offs to recommend a target network design.

skills.name: DC Location Analysis
skills.description: Analyze distribution-center location candidates using demand gravity, transit times, labor, cost, and risk to support site selection.

skills.name: Inventory Positioning
skills.description: Recommend where to position inventory across nodes to balance availability, working capital, transfer cost, and fulfillment speed.

skills.name: Safety Stock Policy
skills.description: Set safety-stock policies by SKU or class using demand variability, lead time, service targets, and review cadence with clear formulas and owners.

skills.name: ABC Inventory Analysis
skills.description: Run ABC (and optional XYZ) inventory classification by value, volume, or criticality to prioritize controls, counting, and service policies.

skills.name: Logistics Demand Plan
skills.description: Translate demand forecasts into logistics capacity, inventory, and freight plans for a defined period with owners and constraint flags.

skills.name: S&OP Logistics Input
skills.description: Prepare logistics inputs for S&OP: capacity, lead times, network constraints, cost outlook, and risks that shape the consensus plan.

skills.name: Logistics Capacity Plan
skills.description: Assess warehouse, fleet, labor, and carrier capacity versus demand, highlighting bottlenecks, surge options, and investment priorities.

skills.name: Peak Season Plan
skills.description: Build a peak-season logistics plan covering volume ramps, labor, space, carriers, cutoffs, and contingency playbooks for high-demand periods.

skills.name: Port Congestion Response
skills.description: Outline port and terminal congestion response: alternate ports, mode shifts, demurrage control, inventory buffers, and stakeholder updates.

skills.name: Customs & Clearance Guide
skills.description: Document customs clearance steps, required docs, HS classification notes, brokers, duties risk, and timelines for cross-border shipments.

skills.name: Bill of Lading Checklist
skills.description: Provide a bill-of-lading accuracy checklist covering shipper/consignee data, freight terms, counts, seals, special instructions, and system owners.

skills.name: Proof-of-Delivery Process
skills.description: Define proof-of-delivery capture, validation, dispute handling, and archiving so delivery confirmation supports billing and claims.

skills.name: Track-and-Trace Design
skills.description: Design track-and-trace visibility across carriers and nodes with event standards, exception alerts, customer views, and integration notes.

skills.name: IoT Fleet Telemetry Plan
skills.description: Plan IoT and telematics for fleet or assets: sensors, data use cases, alerts, privacy, and operating cadence for utilization and safety.

skills.name: Fuel Surcharge Policy
skills.description: Define fuel surcharge formulas, index sources, update cadence, and customer/carrier communication so fuel cost recovery stays transparent.

skills.name: Carrier Rate Card
skills.description: Build or refresh a carrier rate card by lane, mode, accessorials, minimums, and validity windows for quoting and cost control.

skills.name: Freight Tender Package
skills.description: Prepare a freight tender package with volumes, lanes, service requirements, bid templates, evaluation criteria, and award process.

skills.name: 3PL Scorecard
skills.description: Create a 3PL performance scorecard with weighted KPIs, data sources, review cadence, and improvement actions for partner governance.

skills.name: 4PL Engagement Brief
skills.description: Outline when and how to engage a 4PL/LLP: scope, orchestration model, data needs, commercial structure, and success metrics.

skills.name: Reverse Logistics Program
skills.description: Design reverse logistics for returns, recalls, repair, and recycling with network paths, cost recovery, and disposition rules.

skills.name: Logistics Sustainability Plan
skills.description: Propose logistics sustainability actions across modes, packaging, network design, and suppliers with measurable targets and trade-offs.

skills.name: Shipment Carbon Estimate
skills.description: Estimate shipment or network carbon impact by mode and lane, with method notes, data gaps, and reduction levers for reporting.

skills.name: Packaging Optimization
skills.description: Optimize packaging for product protection, cube efficiency, material cost, and sustainability without harming damage rates or customer experience.

skills.name: Label Compliance Checklist
skills.description: Ensure shipping and product labels meet carrier, regulatory, and customer requirements with field standards, samples, and audit steps.

skills.name: Temperature Excursion Response
skills.description: Define temperature excursion detection, risk assessment, product disposition, root-cause analysis, and CAPA for cold-chain failures.

skills.name: Cargo Security Protocol
skills.description: Specify cargo security controls for high-value or high-risk freight: seals, routing, facilities, chain of custody, and incident response.

skills.name: Cargo Insurance Guide
skills.description: Clarify cargo insurance coverage, declared value, exclusions, claim triggers, and when to buy additional cover versus carrier liability.

skills.name: Freight Claim Timeline
skills.description: Map freight claim timelines with filing deadlines, evidence stages, escalation paths, and owner actions from discovery through settlement.

skills.name: Logistics KPI Dashboard Spec
skills.description: Specify logistics KPIs (OTIF, cost/unit, dwell, claims, inventory accuracy) with definitions, targets, owners, and reporting cadence.

skills.name: Logistics Control Tower Design
skills.description: Design a logistics control tower: visibility scope, exception playbooks, escalation, roles, tooling, and decision rights for end-to-end control.

skills.name: Weekly Logistics Ops Review
skills.description: Produce a weekly logistics operations review covering volume, service, cost, exceptions, carrier performance, and prioritized actions.

skills.name: Logistics Exception Playbook
skills.description: Write a logistics exception playbook for delays, shortages, damages, capacity crunches, and weather with roles, steps, and communications.

skills.name: Custom Logistics Deliverable
skills.description: Create a custom logistics deliverable tailored to the stated goal, audience, and constraints when no standard skill fully fits the need.
